class.name: RegularPolygonWire
class.description: [RegularPolygonWire] builds a closed regular polygon on an optional [CadPlane]. The polygon is centered on the plane origin and uses a circumradius.

method.name: build_regular_polygon
method.description: Builds a regular polygon with [param side_count] sides and circumradius [param radius] on [param plane]. If [param plane] is omitted, the global XY plane is used. [param start_angle_radians] rotates the first vertex around the plane origin.
